public_reputation: Known around Shelkopolis through day-to-day work as porter.
manner: Judges the world by weight, delay, and whether moving one thing will jam five others behind it. In Shelkopolis, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of porter in and around Shelkopolis, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis workable through the obligations of porter while managing the immediate pressure of glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of porter credible while absorbing the strain created by glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry.

adventure_hooks.summary: Faelar Velvetmere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on porter duties in Shelkopolis.
Faelar Velvetmere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry around Shelkopolis.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Faelar Velvetmere is immediately readable as a porter tied to Shelkopolis.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Faelar Velvetmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a porter and the daily pressures of Shelkopolis.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a porter, and proof that strangers will not make Shelkopolis harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Faelar Velvetmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a porter too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can move people or goods quickly and knows which cargo draws the wrong attention.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Faelar Velvetmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Faelar Velvetmere always knows more about Shelkopolis than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a porter in Shelkopolis.
